message: docs: add 5 testimonials (Philo01, jakubkrcmar, liran_tal, pepicrft, serrrfirat)

files.patch:
@@ -1,4 +1,29 @@
 [
+  {
+    "quote": "My @clawdbot a.k.a. I.R.I.S. a.k.a. Integrated Reasoning & Insight System (it came up with this 😂) is now fully set up to develop apps for me on the go! It even made this nice little status page 💅",
+    "author": "Philo01",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Philo01/status/2011204271786672526"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Current level of open-source apps capabilities: does everything, connects to everything, remembers everything. It's all collapsing into one unique personal OS — all apps, interfaces, walled gardens etc gone",
+    "author": "jakubkrcmar",
+    "url": "https://x.com/jakubkrcmar/status/2011186102367814135"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "clawdbot wake up, we're getting agi",
+    "author": "liran_tal",
+    "url": "https://x.com/liran_tal/status/2011183915252252943"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Telegram + Clawdbot + Loom plugin and you've got a tutor to learn about any subject",
+    "author": "pepicrft",
+    "url": "https://x.com/pepicrft/status/2011160717421093314"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "just use @clawdbot man, it will set you free.",
+    "author": "serrrfirat",
+    "url": "https://x.com/serrrfirat/status/2011128261196333448"
+  },
   {
     "quote": "Today was one of those days that I sort of ran to my computer after dropping off my toddler at daycare. Why? Because I got part-way through setting up @clawdbot last night and it's a portal to a new reality.",
